정산예정"},{"kind":"plain","left":158.43,"top":473.62,"width":400.73,"height":13.3,"fontSize":12.24,"lineHeight":13.3,"fontWeight":600,"text":"공사완료일을 24년 12월 31일로 하고, 그 전에 돌관작업 종료시 공사완료일자는 변경가능"},{"kind":"plain","left":158.43,"top":489.17,"width":245.14,"height":13.3,"fontSize":12.24,"lineHeight":13.3,"fontWeight":500,"text":"건축골조공사 지연에 따른 건축설비 돌관공사   <div class="template-clone template-clone--pdf-positioned-v28">
    <style>
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v22,
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v27,
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v28,
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v29 {
        width: fit-content;
        margin: 0 auto;
        background: transparent;
        color: #111827;
        font-family: "Malgun Gothic", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", sans-serif;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-page {
        position: relative;
        margin: 0 auto 16px;
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 0;
        box-sizing: content-box;
        overflow: hidden;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-frame-layer {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        pointer-events: none;
        user-select: none;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text-layer {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        pointer-events: auto;
        user-select: text;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-precision-stage {
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        top: 0;
        transform-origin: top left;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule {
        position: absolute;
        background: #0f172a;
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule--v {
        top: 0;
        width: 1.15px;
        transform: translateX(-0.5px);
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule--h {
        left: 0;
        height: 1.15px;
        transform: translateY(-0.5px);
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text {
        position: absolute;
        color: #111827;
        white-space: pre;
        letter-spacing: -0.01em;
        overflow: visible;
        font-weight: 500;
        -webkit-text-stroke: 0.15px currentColor;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text--label {
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text .template-clone__pdf-inline-value,
      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text .template-clone__pdf-block-value {
        display: inline;
        min-height: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-line {
        display: inline-flex;
        width: 100%;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 6px;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-line-code {
        display: inline-block;
        min-width: 24px;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-options {
        display: inline-flex;
        gap: 8px;
        align-items: center;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-option {
        display: inline-flex;
        gap: 3px;
        align-items: center;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-check {
        display: inline-block;
        width: 9px;
        height: 9px;
        border: 1px solid currentColor;
        box-sizing: border-box;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-check--checked::after {
        content: "";
        display: block;
        width: 5px;
        height: 5px;
        margin: 1px;
        background: currentColor;
      }
    </style>

대금 지급방법*"},{"kind":"plain","left":158.43,"top":388.89,"width":87.08,"height":13.3,"fontSize":12.24,"lineHeight":13.3,"fontWeight":600,"text":"본 계약조건과 동일"},{"kind":"plain","left":313.65,"top":388.89,"width":88.62,"height":13.3,"fontSize":12.24,"lineHeight":13.3,"fontWeight":600,"text":"4-1. 대금 지급시기*"},{"kind":"plain","left":414.12,"top":388.89,"width":110.63,"height":13.3,"fontSize":12.24,"lineHeight":13.3,"fontWeight":500,"text":"발생한 익월 기성지급 특기사항"},{"kind":"plain","left":158.43,"top":460.32,"width":364.06,"height":19.95,"fontSize":18,"lineHeight":19.95,"fontWeight":500,"text":"공사진행, 협의진행 등의 상황에 따라 인원변동 가능하며 실투입 공수로 정산예정"},{"kind":"plain","left":158.43,"top":473.62,"width":400.73,"height":13.3,"fontSize":12.24,"lineHeight":13.3,"fontWeight":600,"text":"공사완료일을 24년 12월 31일로 하고, 그 전에 돌관작업 종료시 공사완료일자는 변경가능"},{"kind":"plain","left":158.43,"top":489.17,"width":245.14,"height":13.3,"fontSize":12.24,"lineHeight":13.3,"fontWeight":500,"text":"건축골조공사 지연에 따른 건축설비 돌관공사 첨부파일"},{"kind":"plain","left":158.43,"top":515.77,"width":173.06,"height":13.3,"fontSize":12.24,"lineHeight":13.3,"fontWeight":500,"text":"(주)백산이엔씨   <div class="template-clone template-clone--pdf-positioned-v28">
    <style>
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v22,
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v27,
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v28,
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v29 {
        width: fit-content;
        margin: 0 auto;
        background: transparent;
        color: #111827;
        font-family: "Malgun Gothic", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", sans-serif;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-page {
        position: relative;
        margin: 0 auto 16px;
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 0;
        box-sizing: content-box;
        overflow: hidden;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-frame-layer {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        pointer-events: none;
        user-select: none;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text-layer {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        pointer-events: auto;
        user-select: text;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-precision-stage {
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        top: 0;
        transform-origin: top left;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule {
        position: absolute;
        background: #0f172a;
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule--v {
        top: 0;
        width: 1.15px;
        transform: translateX(-0.5px);
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule--h {
        left: 0;
        height: 1.15px;
        transform: translateY(-0.5px);
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text {
        position: absolute;
        color: #111827;
        white-space: pre;
        letter-spacing: -0.01em;
        overflow: visible;
        font-weight: 500;
        -webkit-text-stroke: 0.15px currentColor;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text--label {
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text .template-clone__pdf-inline-value,
      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text .template-clone__pdf-block-value {
        display: inline;
        min-height: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-line {
        display: inline-flex;
        width: 100%;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 6px;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-line-code {
        display: inline-block;
        min-width: 24px;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-options {
        display: inline-flex;
        gap: 8px;
        align-items: center;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-option {
        display: inline-flex;
        gap: 3px;
        align-items: center;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-check {
        display: inline-block;
        width: 9px;
        height: 9px;
        border: 1px solid currentColor;
        box-sizing: border-box;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-check--checked::after {
        content: "";
        display: block;
        width: 5px;
        height: 5px;
        margin: 1px;
        background: currentColor;
      }
    </style>
